tweets.text:
Someone asked me 1000 shares of $SPCX or a Knicks Championship ring?

I said if you toss in a Jalen Brunson rookie card with the ring, I’ll gladly forgo the 1000 shares of SpaceX.

Waited all my life for this. Money can be made anytime.

But this experience we may never get back.

thread_tweets.text:
For instance - if you're lucky enough to see HYPE touch somewhere between $30-$40 in line with a broader market selloff, ape it.

Solana saw a drawdown from $59 to $21 over a couple of months in the summer of 2021, and proceeded to rip a 10x from there in less than two months.

Different market and different market conditions, but point being SOL was a high momentum name that saw a massive drawdown in line with a broader market dip led by BTC... lots of people sidelined were saying the run was over... and the largest move hadn't even started yet.

tweets.text: Gold traders are reacting to much higher inflation data as if it means the Fed will have to fight harder to rein it in. But in reality, it means that inflation is running away, as the Fed can't rein it in, since trying to do so would create an unprecedented financial crisis.
tweets.full_text: Gold traders are reacting to much higher inflation data as if it means the Fed will have to fight harder to rein it in. But in reality, it means that inflation is running away, as the Fed can't rein it in, since trying to do so would create an unprecedented financial crisis.

tweets.text: Producer prices spiked 1.1% in May, following a downwardly revised 1.1% rise in April. That's back-to-back months of 14% annualized increases. So far in 2026, the PPI is already up 4%. If this pace continues, it will rise 10% in 2026, matching the 2021 gain, the most since 1980.
tweets.full_text: Producer prices spiked 1.1% in May, following a downwardly revised 1.1% rise in April. That's back-to-back months of 14% annualized increases. So far in 2026, the PPI is already up 4%. If this pace continues, it will rise 10% in 2026, matching the 2021 gain, the most since 1980.
